metadata.file_path: /Volumes/My Passport/Ojo otra vez musica de Tidal Original descarga/Consolidado2025/Tracks/Bruce Springsteen - I'm On Fire.flac
metadata.title: I'm On Fire
metadata.lyrics:
[00:21.47] Hey, little girl, is your daddy home?
[00:23.95] Did he go away and leave you all alone?
[00:28.59] I got a bad desire
[00:32.63] Oh, oh, oh, I'm on fire
[00:37.67] Tell me now, baby, is he good to you
[00:40.16] And can he do to you the things that I do?
[00:43.05] Oh no, I can take you higher
[00:48.63] Oh-oh-oh, I'm on fire
[00:54.08] 
[01:14.46] Sometimes it's like someone took a knife, baby, edgy and dull
[01:17.95] And cut a six-inch valley through the middle of my skull
[01:24.60] At night, I wake up with the sheets soaking wet
[01:27.56] And a freight train running through the middle of my head
[01:30.27] Only you can cool my desire
[01:36.11] Oh-oh-oh, I'm on fire
[01:41.48] Oh-oh-oh, I'm on fire
[01:47.05] Oh-oh-oh, I'm on fire
[01:50.68]
